summary: Successfully implemented pulse lineage command with ASCII tree and JSON output formats. The command visualizes build DAG relationships with status icons, type indicators, and jettison markers.
decisions: Used ASCII art tree rendering with box-drawing characters for clear hierarchy visualization
Implemented both tree and JSON output formats for human and machine consumption
Added depth limiting to prevent overly deep tree displays
Used specific icons for different build statuses (✓ ● ○ ✗ ☠ ⊘) and ⚡ for jettisons
Made slug argument optional to show all builds by default, specific subtree when provided
notes_for_orchestrator: Command successfully tested with existing builds. Shows proper parent-child relationships including jettisons. All success criteria met: tree rendering, JSON output, status icons, jettison markers, proper handling of builds without lineage.
